title: Bandwidth API credentials should not be disclosed
description: Bandwidth is a communications platform providing voice, messaging, and 911 APIs. API credentials authenticate requests to send SMS/MMS, make voice calls, and manage phone numbers. Exposing credentials allows unauthorized communications at your expense.
recommendation: Remove Bandwidth API credentials from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at dashboard.bandwidth.com.
impact: Unauthorized SMS/MMS sending and voice calls billed to your account, phone number management, and 911 service disruption.

checks.message: Bandwidth API token detected. Bandwidth API credentials authenticate communications platform requests including sending SMS and MMS messages billed to your account, making and receiving voice calls, managing phone number inventory, accessing call recordings and messaging history, and configuring 911 emergency services. Exposing these credentials allows unauthorized use of your communications account. Rotate immediately at dashboard.bandwidth.com.
Bandwidth account credential detected. Rotate at dashboard.bandwidth.com.
